name: agent-ui
description: Electron desktop app wrapping the Claude Agent SDK as a chat UI

scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently -k -n srv,app -c yellow,cyan "npm run start -w agent-server" "npm run start -w agent-client"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:server && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.build: npm run build -w agent-server && npm run build -w agent-client
scripts.build:win: npm run build -w agent-server && npm run build:win -w agent-client
scripts.build:mac: npm run build -w agent-server && npm run build:mac -w agent-client
scripts.build:linux: npm run build -w agent-server && npm run build:linux -w agent-client
scripts.build:unpack: npm run build -w agent-server && npm run build:unpack -w agent-client
